purpose: Golden approval-boundary fixture for rch pressure packets. This fixture pins the JSON shape and required Markdown facts for critical pressure, stale telemetry, missing ballast, disabled workers, and cleanup candidates that must remain approval-only.

non_deletion_recovery.summary: Read-only recovery checks ran before requesting deletion-level cleanup approval.

attempts.name: rch_capabilities_refresh
attempts.expected_result: refresh worker runtime and pressure telemetry without deleting data

attempts.name: rch_status
attempts.expected_result: capture the post-refresh worker pressure state

attempts.name: rch_focused_dry_run
attempts.expected_result: prove whether focused cargo validation can reach worker selection

attempts.name: rch_doctor_fix_dry_run
attempts.expected_result: check for safe automatic daemon/config/telemetry repairs without applying changes

pre_cleanup_read_only_checks.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i /home/ubuntu/.ssh/contabo_vps_ed25519 ubuntu@38.242.209.154 'if test -e /data/projects/franken_engine/target_PearlTower_focused; then find /data/projects/franken_engine/target_PearlTower_focused -name .sbh-protect -print -quit; fi'
pre_cleanup_read_only_checks.blocks_cleanup_if: any stdout, ssh failure, or non-zero exit

pre_cleanup_read_only_checks.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i /home/ubuntu/.ssh/contabo_vps_ed25519 ubuntu@38.242.209.154 'if test -e /data/projects/franken_engine/target_PearlTower_focused; then sudo -n lsof +D /data/projects/franken_engine/target_PearlTower_focused 2>&1 | head -20; fi'
pre_cleanup_read_only_checks.blocks_cleanup_if: any stdout, sudo authentication failure, ssh failure, or non-zero exit

cleanup_candidates.source_command: bounded read-only du/find over target, .rch-target, and .rch-target debug/incremental directories
cleanup_candidates.reason_it_might_help: Build-output artifact on a worker excluded by rch pressure policy; even sub-GiB .rch-target artifacts can unblock near-threshold workers.
cleanup_candidates.risk_notes: Deletion-level cleanup requires explicit written approval for this exact path.
